title: tragacantha amherstiana
intro: Tragacantha amherstiana, also known as Amherst's needle-grass or needle grass, is a type of perennial grass native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antitussive properties. Tragacantha amherstiana is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its full potential.
